title: kaelys-catalog entry
description: One repo's self-description, aggregated by kaelys-js/kaelys-js into the profile README's <!-- catalog:begin --> block.

$schema.description: Reference to this schema — allows editors to autocomplete + validate the file. Ignored by the sync script.

name.description: Repo slug (matches the GitHub repo name).

tagline.description: One-line hook. Rendered next to the repo name.

sellMe.description: Paragraph pitch: what this is, why it exists, who it's for.

status.description: Lifecycle stage — profile readers use this to gauge how ready the repo is.

primaryLanguage.description: Primary language override. Defaults to the GitHub-detected language when omitted.

technology.description: Free-form technology tags rendered as a comma-separated line.

topics.description: GitHub topic-style tags. Defaults to the repo's GitHub topics when omitted.

products.description: Named sub-components inside the repo (e.g. workspace packages).
